summary: V1 is complete and committed (git main). Next: build the MCP server. The SDK (@modelcontextprotocol/sdk@1.29.0) is PROVEN on Bun via test/mcp.test.ts (McpServer + Client round trip over InMemoryTransport). BUILD: src/mcp/ server + a waystation mcp command starting a StdioServerTransport, exposing thin tool wrappers over EXISTING core (do not reimplement): get_status, get_next_task, get_task, claim_task, release_task, get_brief, render_prompt, create_handoff, list_issues, create_issue, post_message, get_inbox, validate_ledger. Reuse src/core (tasks.nextTask, mutate.claim/finish, brief.buildBrief, prompt.selectPrompts/renderPrompt, handoff.createHandoff, messages.postMessage/inbox, validate.validateLedger). ALL writes must go through the single write path (withLedgerLock in src/core/store.ts); map tool output to the CommandResult/Diagnostic envelope (src/core/result.ts). Run with C:\bun\bin\bun.exe (NOT on PATH). Verify: bun test, bun run typecheck, bunx biome check .  Then dogfood: claim/finish task-mcp-server, reindex, report, validate, commit.
